description: The Mark 3 ISO chemical process pump provides outstanding performance and reliability. Featuring an exclusive micrometer-style impeller adjustment, it is designed for severe chemical and corrosive services.
differentiators: Exclusive micrometer-style impeller adjustment for optimized performance
Reverse vane impeller for superior solids handling and low NPSHr
Standard non-contacting labyrinth seals for extended bearing life

description: The Goulds 3196 is the industry standard for ANSI chemical process pumps. With over 1 million installations worldwide, it offers unparalleled reliability, ease of maintenance, and broad chemical compatibility.
differentiators: i-FRAME power end with intelligent condition monitoring
Fully open impeller for excellent solids handling and minimized wear
Broadest range of material options in the industry

description: Ahlstar end-suction single-stage centrifugal pumps are designed for demanding industrial applications. They offer high efficiency, robust construction, and innovative sealing solutions for harsh fluids.
differentiators: Optimized hydraulic design for high efficiency and low energy consumption
Innovative dynamic seal (Waterless) option for reduced environmental impact
Heavy-duty shaft and bearing assembly for minimized deflection and vibration
